title: Possession Fusion! Momokyun Sword!!
overview: Trained all her life, Momoko's skills are finally put to the test as she must battle the oni as they invade in search of a powerful treasure.

title: Demon Combination!? Onihime is Here!
overview: The Celestial Maiden Squad and Momoko begin their journey and a face off begins with a formidable enemy.

title: One for All and All for One: The Celestial Maiden Squad!
overview: The group is joined by the wizard, Seimei, and his servant, Toutetsu; Onihime enlists the aid of Enki.

title: Mad Dance of the Giant Boobs! The Pine Forest of Miho!
overview: Momoko and Onihime agree to a truce as their groups relax at the beach together.

title: Suspicious! The Trap in the Fog!
overview: Momoko and her friends may have met their match; a fortune teller's prediction causes trouble.

title: A Star Is Born! We're the Celestial Maiden Squad!
overview: The members of Celestial Maiden Squad have become idols and can no longer search for Michimi Peach Fragments.

title: Lost! Momoko's Important Thing
overview: Onihime's strike causes Momoko to lose the only clue she has to her past and Youki hatches a plan to get all of the Michimi Peach fragments.

title: Peach Plan the Underwear That Disappeared Into the Stream!
overview: The ladies are excited about the medicinal capabilities of a hot spring; a panty thief strikes and Momoko and the others must defeat the culprit.

title: A Huge Plot Twist! Momo's Secret!
overview: Momoko and Onihime learn they have a lot in common and they begin to face the truth of their past.

title: Shocking! Onigashima's Counterattack!!
overview: The future looks bleak following the recent defeat and Momoko is still struggling with the truth of her past.

title: The Last Battle! Momoko vs Jakiou!!
overview: Momoko and her companions storm Onigashima but are forced to separate, leaving Momoko to face Jakiou.

title: Peach Fantasy! Momo Kyun Sword
overview: Youki looks to take control of the Michimi Peach; Onihime continues to struggle with the truth of her identity.
